_comment: S2 second real scene (docs/scale-track.md): torch training on the Mitsuba 'bedroom' gallery scene at 512x512 / 64 spp -- same hyperparameters as the T1 kitchen run (examples/kitchen_512_torch.json) so the two scenes are directly comparable. Download + export first: uv run python examples/scenes/download_scene.py bedroom && uv run python -m nrp.mitsuba_exporter --scene examples/scenes/bedroom/scene.xml --width 512 --height 512 --spp 64 --bounces 4 --out out/bedroom-512/path_cache.npz
